## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] I added/updated tests for any changed behavior
- [ ] If this touches the **safety layer** (Action Gate, Task Contract, Agent View extractor, permission modes, verification, key handling, page isolation), I added tests and described the impact below
